projects.title: Next Topper
projects.description: Next Topper is a full-stack online learning platform inspired by modern ed-tech applications like Udemy and Apna College. The platform allows students to explore and enroll in courses, while mentors can create and manage educational content. The frontend is built using React.js, ensuring a responsive and user-friendly interface. The backend is developed using Node.js and Express.js with MongoDB for efficient data management. Key features include user authentication, course enrollment, role-based access (student/mentor), and content management. The platform is designed to provide a seamless learning experience with scalable architecture, and future enhancements include AI-based recommendations and chatbot integration.

projects.title: Snapgram
projects.description: Snapgram is a clone of Instagram. The frontend is built using React.js, leveraging modern tools such as React Hooks, React Query, and React Hook Form for  form handling. The backend is powered by Appwrite, a serverless backend-as-a-service platform, providing authentication, database, file storage, and more. Users can upload photos, follow other users, like and comment on posts.

projects.title: Airbnb Clone
projects.description: Airbnb Clone is a replica of the popular accommodation booking platform. The frontend is built using EJS (Embedded JavaScript) templating for server-side rendering, providing dynamic content generation. The backend is powered by Node.js and Express.js, with MongoDB as the database. Users can search for listings, view details of listings, book accommodations, and leave reviews, simulating the functionalities of the original Airbnb platform.
